Environment

local-apitenant acme

This cockpit is now environment-driven and can target localhost, kind, or a public cloud hostname without rewriting links.

Activity

Control plane synced. Ready for agent rollout.

Trust and authority control plane

Operate chat, voice, providers and monitoring as one system.

This workspace is structured by real operator use-cases: rollout new agents, bind models, load tenant knowledge, verify voice readiness, inspect Grafana dashboards, then launch perf runs without switching tooling.

Open chatOpen Grafana

Environment

local-apitenant acme

This cockpit is now environment-driven and can target localhost, kind, or a public cloud hostname without rewriting links.

Activity

Control plane synced. Ready for agent rollout.

Mission control

Everything required for enterprise operations is surfaced by domain

Provider registry, model catalog, agent rollout, Qdrant knowledge management, voice readiness, load testing and observability are separated into operational zones so the admin path matches how platform teams actually work.

Agent registryProvider routingRealtime voiceSecurity postureGrafana launchers

Operator rhythm

Fast path

Launch common actions without leaving the home strip.

Agents

0

Versioned agents available for tenant-scoped chats and voice sessions.

Providers

0

External, BYO and Triton-backed providers under one registry.

Models

0

LLM, ASR, TTS and embedding capability bindings.

Conversations

0

Persisted chat history and execution traces currently stored.

Workspace

Choose an operations domain

Tabs are organized around day-two platform work: onboarding, tuning, observing and validating.

Monitoring launchers

Open Grafana by domain

Every major domain in the platform now has a dedicated entry point. Operators should not hunt for dashboards.

Platform Overview

Traffic, service health, baseline platform throughput.

grafana

Chat Pipeline

SSE startup latency, run flow, chat service health.

grafana

Voice Pipeline

Voice setup, transcripts, interruption recovery path.

grafana

Provider Health

Provider routing, error rate, fallback and health posture.

grafana

Triton Inference

Self-hosted inference plane overview and model latency.

grafana

Data Plane

Kafka, Redis, Postgres, Qdrant, object storage.

grafana

Agent Overview

Per-agent latency, throughput, retrieval, voice mix.

grafana

Tenant Overview

Tenant isolation, usage shape, quotas and engagement.

grafana

Load Testing Results

Smoke, load, stress, spike and soak histories.

grafana

Cost / Usage / Latency

Spend posture, provider efficiency and latency mix.

grafana

Operations surfaces

Supporting control systems

Identity, workflow, object storage and raw metrics are one click away.

Grafana Home

Dashboards, explore, traces and product analytics.

ops

Keycloak Admin

SSO, realm config, clients, roles and identity flows.

ops

Temporal UI

Workflow state, retries, long-running orchestration.

ops

Prometheus

Raw metrics and rule evaluation entry point.

ops

MinIO Console

Attachments, artifacts and object-storage checks.

ops

Chat UI

Open the user workspace and validate live chat flows.
